title: moneysweep-pr finance-lane report
description: Machine-readable report emitted by readiness/moneysweep_finance_lane.py (moneysweep_finance_lane_report.json). This is the moneysweep-pr counterpart to spiderweb-pr's spatial-lane report and shares its shape. Its `export_contract_version` (1.0.0) versions THIS lane-report contract only; it is independent of the federation 'moneysweep-pr-export' contract versioned in scripts/build_export_package.py (1.2.0).

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of report generation.

lane_id.description: Stable identifier for this intake lane.

input_dir.description: Directory the lane consumed its derivatives CSV from.

producer.description: Upstream component that produced the routed derivatives.

export_contract_version.description: Semantic version of the finance-lane report contract (this schema). Distinct from the federation export contract.

status.description: READY when at least one row routed, otherwise EMPTY.

input_rows.description: Total derivative rows read from the input CSV.

routed_rows.description: Rows that routed to at least one normalized table or review queue.

normalized_writes.description: Total records written across all normalized tables.

by_table.description: Per-normalized-table record counts, keyed by table name.

by_review_queue.description: Per-review-queue record counts, keyed by queue name.

discrepancy_count.description: Rows recorded in the discrepancy queue (routed nowhere else).

zero_loss_pass.description: True when routed_rows + discrepancy_count == input_rows (nothing dropped).

outputs.description: Relative paths of the artifacts this lane wrote.
